install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git wget && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

python -c "import pickle, os; f=os.path.join('/workspace/naslib/naslib/data','nb201_all.pickle'); assert os.path.exists(f), f'Missing {f}'; d=pickle.load(open(f,'rb')); assert len(d)==15625, f'Bad data: {len(d)} archs'; print(f'NAS-Bench-201 data verified: {len(d)} architectures')"
